text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks El Condor Pasa's debut. Her
motivated spirit burns bright as she prepares to
take flight. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's disappointed with the lack of international
media attention her debut has garnered. In the
end, this only drives her desire to make her
presence known.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the cheers of her friends propelling her
forward, El Condor Pasa sets off for her debut
race, ready to take the world by storm.
